meta.title: Kuan Zhe Huang (ZEN) - Creative Full Stack Developer, Puchong
meta.description: Kuan Zhe Huang (ZEN) is a Creative Full Stack Developer based in Puchong, Selangor - building end-to-end products where engineering meets art direction. Specialising in Angular, React, Unity, 3D & VFX.

caseStudy.subtitle: Connecting freelance home pros with the tenants who need them.
caseStudy.description: Malaysian homeowners needed trusted help. Freelance servicers needed steady work. My Home Servicer bridges both sides with a marketplace that makes booking a home pro as simple as ordering a ride.
points: Two-sided marketplace connecting freelance servicers with tenants who need trusted help.
Built end to end with Angular on the frontend and Express.js on the backend.
Gated role architecture across guest, customer, servicer, and admin portals.
Secured with route guards and JWT middleware authority layers on both ends.
Quote-to-payment in one flow with real-time tracking across six order states.
Escrow-aware REST API powering 30+ categories across 7 service verticals.
Fully responsive interface that scales from mobile to desktop.

items.title: Co-Bug Dump
items.description: Offline-first AI bug tracker built as a developer tool. Search, categorize, and resolve bugs without an internet connection.

items.title: Senang Invoice
items.tags: MOBILE APP · E-INVOICE SOLUTION · SME HELPER
items.description: Local-first Malaysian e-invoice app that turns a photo, voice note, or quick input into MyInvois-valid invoices. AI auto-classifies line items and submits to IRBM in one click, generating a QR code and PDF instantly - all while data stays on your device.

items.title: Zen Resume
items.description: Interactive resume and portfolio for a creative full-stack developer. A WebGL booting intro opens into a filterable project gallery spanning game, shader, 3D, and web work - all in one playful single-page experience.

titleLines: build things where code meets craft.
about.bio: Six years across the spectrum. Indie studios, SME team, startup, and structured MNC. I build products end to end Angular and React on the frontend, Node and Express on the backend, REST APIs that scale, and databases that stay out of the way. When I'm not shipping web apps, I'm deep in Unity, Unreal, Shader work, where I honed the precision I bring to every line of code.
